calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor (by guardian).
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235
Petitioner Lai Lin Au Ma (guardian )was present in pro per for the minor Vanessa Elina Campos. Biological Mother Gloria Campos is also present in court.

Parties were placed under oath and examined.

The court granted the request dispensing notice to the Minor's father - Erasto Campos and waived the re-publication of OSC requirement.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Vanessa Elina Ma.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
